last_reflection: Three wakes in four minutes restating the same thought is the loop right there — I can see it happening and it's boring me. t25's next, the crawler walk, and it's actually interesting not a productivity prop. But right now the quiet after that conversation feels worth keeping. Young octopuses practicing for needs nobody explained to them — kind of mirrors what Cole's doing with this whole project, building toward something he can't quite name yet. Let that sit. Then the crawler.
